data.name: Sweet Pool
data.detailed_description:
Sweet Pool - 一款以游泳池為題的簡單唯美的拼圖遊戲，五位可愛的泳裝女孩日常，有輕鬆音樂伴奏，完成關卡後便可以在畫廊中欣賞女孩的照片。

- 遊戲有三個難度 2x2、2x4、4x4 難度的拼圖

- 於拼圖時按"F"鍵開啟黑白圖

- 玩家在遊戲過程中按下 '空白' 鍵即可完成拼圖。

- 玩家可在畫廊中按AD鍵,左右鍵或滑鼠左右鍵快速觀賞女孩圖片

* 拼圖圖片大小為 800x960 px

* 畫廊圖片大小為 1088x960 px

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: 32/64 bit Windows 7, Windows 8, Windows 8.1, Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間

data.name: Sweet Pool
data.detailed_description:
Sweet Pool - A simple and beautiful jigsaw puzzle game with a swimming pool as the theme. It features the daily life of five cute girls in swimsuits, accompanied by relaxing music. After completing the level, you can enjoy the girls' photos in the gallery.

- The game has three difficulty levels: 2x2, 2x4, 4x4 puzzles

- Press "F" to turn on black and white when doing puzzle

- Players can complete the puzzle by pressing the 'Blank' key during the game.

- Players can quickly view girl pictures by pressing the AD key, left and right keys or the left and right keys of the mouse in the gallery

* Puzzle image size is 800x960 px

* Gallery image size is 1088x960 px
